title: 皐月賞の後に・研ぎ澄ますは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan struggles to hide her
disappointment after losing out at the Satsuki
Sho, her steady strides away from the track are a
sure sign of her growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan vows to capitalize on what she's
learned today to ensure promising results at both
the Aoba Sho and the Japanese Derby to follow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, motivated by their loss at the Satsuki
Sho, Yaeno Muteki and Sakura Chiyono O each
vow to seize victory at the Japanese Derby.
